pages.title: Color Madness Spot the Differences
pages.description:
Identify subtle visual differences between vibrant images to sharpen observation skills in this spot the difference challenge. Each level introduces intricate color variations and detailed object changes that require careful scanning to spot. The game progressively increases difficulty by adding more differences and reducing hint availability, engaging casual players and younger audiences alike.

Key Features

• Detailed color variation detection  
• Click-and-scan interaction control  
• Increasing difference count per level  
• Limited hint assistance system  
• Bright, colorful image sets
